description_long: This is a set of three wooden furniture pieces, consisting of a central sideboard or dresser flanked by two matching nightstands or small cabinets. The central unit features three open shelves on the left and a set of drawers or doors on the right, each with horizontal handles. The two side units each have three drawers, also with horizontal handles, and stand on short, sturdy legs. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the set a natural, warm appearance. The design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, lobbies, or offices. The overall construction appears robust, with a focus on storage and accessibility.
description: A modern wooden cabinet set with a central sideboard and two matching nightstands, all featuring visible wood grain and horizontal handles. The set is functional and robust, designed for storage and accessibility.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the central sideboard with open shelves and drawers, flanked by two matching nightstands with three drawers each.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the cabinets, with handles barely visible and the legs supporting each unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of all three units, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profiles and the arrangement of the legs.
